start-time.title: Start Time
start-time.description: The number of seconds from the beginning of the audio file to the start of this segment.

end-time.title: End Time
end-time.description: The number of seconds from the beginning of the audio file to the end of this segment.

segment.title: Segment
segment.description: A time segment of audio data, defined by its start and end times in seconds.

TASK_DETECT_ACTIVITY.instillShortDescription: Detect the presence of speech (voice activity) in audio data. The input audio will be internally processed to ensure it has a sample rate of 16kHz (16,000 samples per second) and a single audio channel (mono), even if the original format has a different sample rate or contains multiple channels (stereo). Voice Activity Detection (VAD) refers to the technique used to determine whether the input contains human speech, as opposed to background noise or silence.

audio.description: Audio data to detect voice activity.
audio.title: Audio

min-silence-duration.description: The duration in milliseconds of silence to wait for each speech segment before separating it.
min-silence-duration.title: Minimum Silence Duration

speech-pad.description: The padding in milliseconds to add to speech segments to avoid aggressive cutting.
speech-pad.title: Speech Pad

segments.description: A list of time segments of audio data detected having voice activity.
segments.title: Segments

TASK_SEGMENT.instillShortDescription: Segment audio data into pieces based on the provided time segments.

segments.description: A list of time segments of audio data.
segments.title: Segments

audio-segments.description: A list of segmented audio data.
audio-segments.title: Audios
